body:
### Overview

Cyscale looks for buckets that do not have versioning enabled. Versioning is a means of keeping multiple variants of an object. With versioning you can recover more easily from both unintended user actions and application failures.
name: Ensure buckets have versioning enabled
remediationDescription:
Depending on the provider and service that you use, check out the following resources:

#### AWS

**From the Console**



Perform the following actions to enable versioning for a bucket:



1. Open the security settings using the "Open in AWS" menu option
2. Select the tab `Properties`
3. Under `Bucket versioning`, select `Edit` 
4. Under `Bucket versioning`, select the `Enable` button
5. Click `Save changes`



**From the AWS CLI**



```bash
aws s3api put-bucket-versioning --bucket <bucketName> --versioning-configuration Status=Enabled
```



**Default Value**



By default, buckets are not versioned.



**References**



1. [Enabling versioning on buckets](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/manage-versioning-examples.html)

#### Azure
* [Enable and manage blob versioning](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/blobs/versioning-enable?tabs=portal)

#### Google Cloud
* [Use Object Versioning](https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/using-object-versioning#set)

#### Alibaba
* [Enable Versioning to Protect Valuable Data in Alibaba Cloud OSS](https://www.alibabacloud.com/blog/enable-versioning-to-protect-valuable-data-in-alibaba-cloud-oss_597400)

## Service-wide remediation

> **Recommended when many resources are affected:** fix the platform baseline first so new resources inherit the secure setting, then remediate the existing flagged resources in batches.

### AWS
Use AWS Organizations guardrails, AWS Config rules or conformance packs where they fit, approved account baselines, and IaC modules so new resources inherit the secure setting.
### Azure
Use management group or subscription Azure Policy assignments, remediation tasks where supported, landing-zone standards, and IaC modules so drift is prevented at scale.
### Alibaba Cloud
Use Resource Directory guardrails, account baselines, and IaC modules so the secure setting is applied consistently across environments.
### Google Cloud
Use organization or folder policies where available, shared project templates, logs and alerting baselines, and IaC modules so new resources inherit the secure setting.

## Operational rollout

1. Fix the baseline first at the account, subscription, project, cluster, or tenant scope that owns this control.
2. Remediate the currently affected resources in batches, starting with internet-exposed and production assets.
3. Re-scan and track approved exceptions with an owner and expiry date.
